DEFT'S MOT TO VACATE JUDGMENT, P&A, EXHIBITS -FILED

/CAL:POSSIBLE DISPOSITION & DEFENSE MOTION TO VACATE PLEA/X:PROBATION TRANSFERRED FROM LOS ANGELES COUNTY/DAWT/X:PEOPLE STATED ON THE RECORD THE RESEARCH THE PEOPLE HAD DONE ON THIS MATTER/X:PEOPLE CONCEDE TO THE MOTION//X:DEFENSE MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT IS GRANTED/X:PLEA OF NO CONTEST TO VIOLATING 11358HS ENTERED ON 02-04-2011 (IN LOS ANGELES COUNTY) IS SET ASIDE &VACATED /X:SENTENCE IMPOSED ON 02-04-2011 (IN LOS ANGELES COUNTY) IS SET ASIDE & VACATED/X:NO CONTEST PLEA ENTERED ON 02-04-2011 WAS IN VIOLATION OF1016,5PC/X:NOT GUILTY PLEA IS REINSTATED/X:CASE DISMISSED/X:ORDER VACATING PLEA & SENTENCE SIGNED & FILED/

/CAL:FILING OF BRIEFS RE-DEFENSE MOTION TO VACATE PLEA-JUDGMENT/DAWT/X:DEFENSE & PEOPLE DID NOT FILE BRIEFS DUE TO A POSSIBLE DISPOSITION/X:BOTH THE PEOPLE & DEFENSE MADE AN ORAL REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE/X:REQUEST GRANTED//CONTD:POSSIBLE DISPOSITION RE DEFENSE MOTION TO VACATE PLEA/DAWF/

/CAL:TO SET DEFENSE MOTION TO VACATE PLEA-JUDGMENT & PEOPLE'S OPPOSTION/DAWT/X:DEFENSE COUNSEL ALEX REISMAN AND KATE CHATFIELD ARE PRESENT/X:(PROBATION TRANSFERRED FROM LOS ANGELES COUNTY)/X:PER COURT- THE PROPER VENUE TOHEAR THE DEFENSE MOTION TO VACATE PLEA-JUDGMENT IS LOS ANGELES COUNTY -THEORIGINATING COURT/X:REASONS ON THE RECORD,/X:DEFENSE COUNSEL INDICATED HE TRIED TO FILE THE MOTION IN LOS ANGELES COUNTY AND WAS TOLD BY LOS ANGELES THAT THE MOTION SHOULD BE FILED IN SAN FRANCISCO SINCE THE CASE HAD BEENTRANSFERRED TO SAN FRANCISCO/X:PEOPLE STATED THEIR THOUGHTS ON THE MATTERON THE RECORD/CONTD:FURTHER BRIEF RE- WHICH COURT TO HANDLE THE DEFENSE MOTION/DAWF/
